features: FIZZ TIME: Elysium Spa Bath Bombs are an instant relaxing, refreshing, zingy addition to any bath. Simply drop in the bath, watch them fizz and enjoy a fragrant, relaxing soak.
DELICIOUSLY SCENTED: Enjoy the fabulous scent of sweet coconut and zingy lime whilst relaxing in a warm bath.
BATH TRIO: Each resealable pack contains three scented bath bombs. Enjoy multiple silky smooth coconut and lime scented baths.

BUBBLE FREE: Prefer the prefect scented, silky water to relax into? Bath bombs are the perfect addition to your bath, easy to use, just add water, drop the bath bomb, watch it fizz and release the tropical coconut and lime fragrance, relax and enjoy.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Resealable bag. Ready to use, triple pack
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Bath Bombs are an instant relaxing, refreshing, zingy addition to any bath. Simply drop in the bath, watch them fizz and enjoy a fragrant, relaxing soak. Enjoy the fabulous scent of sweet coconut and zingy lime whilst relaxing in a warm bath. Each resealable pack contains three scented bath bombs, enjoy multiple silky smooth coconut and lime scented baths. Prefer the prefect scented, silky water to relax into? Bath bombs are the perfect addition to your bath, easy to use, just add water, drop the bath bomb, watch it fizz and release the tropical coconut and lime fragrance, relax and enjoy. Resealable bag. Ready to use, triple pack. Ingredients Sodium SulphateSodium BicarbonateCitric AcidPEG 400Parfum Directions 1. Fill bath with warm water. 2. Drop one bomb into the water and watch it fizz. 3.
